title: I made $1400 selling one template pack on Etsy #digitalproducts
spoken_script:
# Digital Products Script (45 seconds)

This Brooklyn graphic designer makes fourteen hundred dollars a month from just twenty-two Canva templates. Here's the crazy part: ninety percent margins. You design it once. Then Gumroad or Etsy handles everything automatically. No shipping. No inventory. Just pure passive income forever.

The templates that actually sell? Notion templates, social media calendars, budget planners, and AI prompt packs. One good product can sell hundreds of times from a single listing.

If you want to know exactly how to create and sell these, I put together a free guide. Link is in the bio.
